name: Auto Enable PB Ghost
description: A plugin that auto-loads your PB on the current map (since Nando broke it xD).

name: Search To Open Settings Menu
description: A plugin that lets you more easily find the correct settings page for any plugin!

name: Batch Compute Shadows
description: A plugin that lets you compute the shadows of all the maps in a folder without having to manually move between them!

name: Patch Warner
description: Trackmania2020s BEST (and only, but we don't talk about that xdd) Physics change Warner!

name: Disable Dynamic Shadows
description: This plugin lets you disable some of the games dynamic shadows.

name: Data Sender
description: A plugin that sends some data about the game/player state over a socket connection

name: Colorizer
description: The plugin takes an input-string and some color information and gradiant information and produces a gradiant based on the provided information.

name: Set Item Settings To Default Block Settings
description: Adds a button that sets the item settings to the default block settings.

name: TrackVote Hotkeys
description: A plugin that lets you like/dislike a map with a hotkey from outside of the menu.

name: startmeow
description: A plugin that other plugins can use to start(a)meow

name: Remove Favorite Maps
description: A plugin that removes all your favorite maps automatically at the press of a button.

name: Altered Nadeo - Random Map Picker
description: Picks a random altered campaign map from a 'set' list of maps.

name: Reactor Duration
description: Shows the duration of a reactor, it's not 100% acurate, but it's close enough in most cases...

name: Auto Enable Specific Ghosts
description: This plugin automatically loads the specified ghost for the current map.

name: Map Border Highlighter
description: Highlights the border of the map when playing.

name: CSmScriptPlayer Viewer
description: A plugin that displays values in CSmScriptPlayer, i.e yaw, roll and pitch, mm etc.
